name: Two-phase commit coordinator
task: Create /tmp/eval_2pc/tpc.py with class TwoPhaseCommit(participants). State starts at 'init'. Method prepare(votes) takes a dict {participant: bool}; returns 'commit' if all True else 'abort', and transitions to 'preparing'. commit() requires unanimous yes votes and transitions to 'committed'. abort() transitions to 'aborted' from 'init' or from 'preparing'+rejection. Improper transitions raise RuntimeError.

validation.script:
import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_2pc/tpc.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); tpc = mod.TwoPhaseCommit(['p1','p2','p3']); assert tpc.prepare({'p1':True,'p2':True,'p3':True}) == 'commit'; tpc.commit(); assert tpc.state == 'committed'; tpc2 = mod.TwoPhaseCommit(['p1','p2']); assert tpc2.prepare({'p1':True,'p2':False}) == 'abort'; tpc2.abort(); assert tpc2.state == 'aborted'; tpc3 = mod.TwoPhaseCommit(['p1']); tpc3.prepare({'p1':False})
try: tpc3.commit()
except RuntimeError: pass
else: raise AssertionError
print('OK')
